name: Stead — definition of done (SUBJECT to PRD.md)
note: Every check derives from PRD.md. grade.py runs each with NO human and exits 0 only when all REQUIRED pass. `tier` is the verifiable spiral: build T1, keep it green, then T2, ... A tier banks only when it AND every tier below it are green. T1-T3 required = the shippable care companion; T4-T5 = scored stretch.

checks.desc: T1 RBAC: per-actor roles & scopes (Mom full, PCA care:read, agent scoped); owner-held grant/check/revoke effective immediately; audited
T2 care companion: instant PCA handoff summary + longitudinal health tracking, gated by RBAC

checks.cmd: python -c "import urllib.request,sys; b=urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8770/',timeout=5).read().decode('utf-8','ignore'); sys.exit(0 if 'Stead' in b else 1)"
checks.desc: T3 the REAL Stead app serves on :8770 offline AND its body contains 'Stead' (a foreign server on another port cannot satisfy this)
T4 agent acts on Ruby's behalf within grant; HALT on wrong-vendor/over-cap/after-revoke; raise-cap-on-the-fly; zero ungranted actions
T5 agent vocalizes negotiation + consent events through MARS (offline transcript; real robot = wow)
log excerpt: a verifier caught a failure and the loop self-corrected (Autonomy)

T6 request->approve->act: agent/Ruby requests a NOVEL capability -> parks PENDING -> owner approves to mint a scoped grant (deny blocks) -> agent acts; spawned sub-agent grants ATTENUATE (never widen); audited
